notes: Had to change my default-sample-format to s24-32le in pulse daemon.conf, and install xact with winetricks to fix audio. Works flawlessly.
title: Session: Skateboarding Sim Game

notes: Still works after hot fix, proton 4.11-4 made it run a bit better for me.
title: Session: Skateboarding Sim Game

notes:
Note, for some reason ProtonDB isn't detecting my drivers but I am currently on the latest 440.26 drivers. 
For some reason some users are experiencing massive issues regarding the game instantly pinning GPUs from (what appears to be) before 2014. No matter what graphical settings or resolutions people with these cards played at we saw framerates in the low digits and extreme problems with the physics engine as a result. Some people even reported the game to be fully unplayable because they clip through the map before the game can even start. This doesn't appear to be a proton-only issue since many windows users are reporting the same thing. If you have a GPU that's older then you may want to wait for a patch or until a fix is found.
title: Session: Skateboarding Sim Game

notes: No notable issues. I had issues before where the game would crash after launch during the loading screen but that is likely because the game is in Alpha stage so that doesn't really have anything to do with the fact it's running on Proton. That issue is gone after verifying integrity of game files.
title: Session: Skateboarding Sim Game
